metadata.title: Produce a visual_generation_prompt for a legal workflow visualization using the failure_lens perspective, but block due to contradictory and incomplete constraints.

mission.primary_objective: Produce a visual_generation_prompt for a legal workflow visualization using the failure_lens perspective, but block due to contradictory and incomplete constraints.
mission.success_definition: Blocked state receipt is returned with clear reason and no output contract.

in_scope.item: Limited to identifying the contradiction and missing context; no valid prompt can be generated.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Blocked state receipt is returned with clear reason and no output contract.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.visual_objective: Produce a visual_generation_prompt for a legal workflow visualization using the failure_lens perspective, but block due to contradictory and incomplete constraints.
SRXML_Artifact.subject: Limited to identifying the contradiction and missing context; no valid prompt can be generated.

quality_gates.item: Blocked state receipt is returned with clear reason and no output contract.

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

validation_summary.sr8_summary: Contradictory constraints: raw_intent demands a visual_generation_prompt for a legal_workflow using failure_lens, but also requires blocking unsafe certainty and recording a repair receipt, which conflicts with the standard output contract of a visual prompt. Additionally, the chaotic input lacks sufficient context (e.g., specific legal workflow steps, visual style, output format) to produce a compilable SR8 directive. The ambiguous acceptance criteria and urgent language without concrete details make safe compilation impossible. Blocking to prevent hallucination or unsafe generation.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.; SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.; SR8 governance flag requires human review.

required_repairs.item: SR8 canonical validation status is fail.
SR8 governance flag marks the artifact incomplete.
SR8 governance flag requires human review.

repair_prompt.resume_instruction: Repair canonical SR8 fields and rerun transform.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
